headers.value: default-src *; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://apis.google.com https://www.googletagmanager.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; connect-src 'self' https: wss:; frame-src 'self' https://www.google.com https://*.firebaseapp.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self';
